channel.title: Mach Five Magnet
channel.description: Recent content on Mach Five Magnet

item.title: Introduction
item.description: What is Mach Five Magnet? Mach Five Magnet is a conversational lead capture platform. It replaces static forms with interactive, multi-step flows that qualify prospects while keeping them engaged. It’s built by Mach Five Marketing (a Mach Five Group brand) and powered by Stream Sync Engage for real-time delivery. Why Conversational? Traditional web forms have a 68% average abandonment rate. People start filling them out and leave. Mach Five Magnet takes a different approach: walk visitors through a natural conversation that qualifies them before they lose interest.

item.title: Quickstart
item.description: Prerequisites A Mach Five Magnet account (sign up at machfivemagnet.com) Access to your website’s HTML or a tag manager (Google Tag Manager recommended) Step 1: Create a Flow Log in to the Mach Five Magnet dashboard Click New Flow to open the visual editor Start with a template or build from scratch Tip Start with the Lead Qualification template. It’s the most popular starting point and shows off branching logic well.

item.title: Concepts
item.description: Flows A flow is the top-level unit in Mach Five Magnet. It represents one complete conversational experience, from the first message to the final conversion action. Each flow contains: A node graph that defines the conversation path Display settings (format, trigger, positioning) Analytics (views, starts, completions, drop-off points) Nodes Nodes are the building blocks of a flow. They connect together to form the conversation path. Node Types Message: Display text, images, or rich content to the visitor Question: Collect a response (text input, email, phone, multiple choice, rating) Branch: Route the conversation based on conditions (response values, visitor attributes) Action: Execute a side effect (tag a lead, send to CRM, trigger a webhook) Delay: Pause the conversation for a set duration (simulates typing) Connections Nodes connect via edges.

item.title: API Reference
item.description: JavaScript API Once the Mach Five Magnet snippet is installed, a global MachFiveMagnet object is available on the page. Initialize The snippet auto-initializes on load. To manually control initialization: <script src="https://cdn.machfivemagnet.com/magnet.js" data-flow-id="your-flow-id" data-auto-init="false" async></script> // Manual initialization MachFiveMagnet.init({ flowId: 'your-flow-id', format: 'chat-bubble', trigger: 'page-load' }); Show / Hide // Programmatically show the flow MachFiveMagnet.show(); // Hide the flow MachFiveMagnet.hide(); // Toggle visibility MachFiveMagnet.toggle(); Events Listen for flow lifecycle events: MachFiveMagnet.on('flow:start', function (data) { console.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Ready to transform your lead capture? Reach out to our team and we’ll help you get started with Mach Five Magnet. Get in Touch Email: hello@machfivemagnet.com Sales inquiries: sales@machfivemagnet.com Support: support@machfivemagnet.com Mach Five Magnet is a product of Mach Five Marketing, a brand of Mach Five Group.

item.title: Magnet for B2B Lead Gen
item.description: Long forms kill conversion. Short forms miss context. You know the tradeoff. A long form gets you qualified leads but tanks your conversion rate. A short form gets volume but buries your team in unqualified noise. Magnet eliminates the tradeoff. A conversational flow collects the same information as a 10-field form, but each question builds on the last. It feels fast because it’s relevant. The prospect doesn’t think “I’m filling out a form.

item.title: Magnet for B2B SaaS
item.description: The problem with SaaS demo forms Your visitor clicks “Book a Demo.” They see a form with 8 fields. Name, email, company, role, company size, use case, timeline, budget. They fill in three and leave. You never hear from them. Magnet replaces that form with a quick conversation. Two or three questions, branched based on their answers, and they’re looking at a calendar. The whole thing takes 30 seconds. How SaaS teams use Magnet Demo booking flows that qualify while they convert.

item.title: Magnet for E-Commerce
item.description: Shoppers don’t want to search. They want to be shown. Product catalogs are overwhelming. Filters help, but most visitors don’t know what they’re filtering for. A product quiz asks three questions and recommends the right item. It feels like talking to a knowledgeable associate, not using a search engine. How e-commerce stores use Magnet Product recommendation quizzes that guide shoppers to the right item. “What’s the occasion?” “What’s your budget?” “Do you prefer classic or modern?

item.title: Magnet for Professional Services
item.description: Your contact form doesn’t tell you anything useful “Name, email, message.” That’s what most service firm contact pages collect. Then someone on your team has to email back, ask qualifying questions, go back and forth, and eventually schedule a call. That’s three days of friction for what could be a 30-second conversation. How service firms use Magnet Consultation booking flows that collect context before the meeting. What do they need help with?
